response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The Reference JSON lyrics were incorrect (they appeared to be for a different song also titled 'Yakusoku'). I performed a 100% manual transcription of the correct song 'Yakusoku' by Eve based on the audio and on-screen title card. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the reference lyrics as they did not match the audio. Used the song title card and scene context for translation. 3. Timing & Pacing: The first minute features rapid multi-speaker dialogue requiring tight synchronization. The song performance follows, with subtitles precisely anchored to vocal bursts and instantaneous transitions (Rule 3) applied during continuous phrases to maintain pacing.

subtitles.original: 知らない世界の中では
subtitles.english: In a world I don't know

subtitles.original: 時間が止まっていくような気がした
subtitles.english: It felt as if time was coming to a stop

subtitles.original: いつも見せないような表情が
subtitles.english: Expressions you wouldn't usually show

subtitles.original: その距離が少しだけ愛おしかった
subtitles.english: That distance was just a little bit precious

subtitles.original: 巻き戻せないと
subtitles.english: Saying we can't turn back time

subtitles.original: はしゃいでいるその横顔を抱きかかえて
subtitles.english: I embrace your profile as you frolic

subtitles.original: 闇をじっと駆け出した
subtitles.english: And dashed straight through the darkness

subtitles.original: 君に染まる世界が
subtitles.english: A world colored by you

subtitles.original: かじかんだ両手が心から願うよ
subtitles.english: My frozen hands pray from the bottom of my heart

subtitles.original: 終わらせたくなどないんだと
subtitles.english: That I don't want this to ever end

subtitles.original: 思い出の中にはいつも君の姿
subtitles.english: You are always there in my memories

subtitles.original: 夢のまま 覚めないまま
subtitles.english: Remaining a dream, without ever waking up

subtitles.original: その笑顔が忘れられないよ
subtitles.english: I can't forget that smile of yours

subtitles.original: 言葉では足りないようで 大人になんてなれないよ
subtitles.english: Words aren't enough, I can't even become an adult

subtitles.original: くだらないことばっかり それでも楽しかった
subtitles.english: Just trivial things, but even so, it was fun

subtitles.original: ずっと今がこのまま続いたらいいななんて
subtitles.english: Wishing that 'now' would just continue like this forever

subtitles.original: 左に跳ね返してみせるの
subtitles.english: I'll show you I can bounce it back to the left

subtitles.original: 泣きそうな声で
subtitles.english: With a voice that sounds like it's about to cry

subtitles.original: 新しい世界では
subtitles.english: In the new world

subtitles.original: きっと心から笑えていけるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'll be able to laugh from my heart

subtitles.original: 謝りたいな
subtitles.english: I want to apologize

subtitles.original: 見せる顔なんてないよ
subtitles.english: I don't have a face to show you

subtitles.original: 僕は君のもう未来などどこにもいないようだ
subtitles.english: It seems I'm no longer anywhere in your future

subtitles.original: 逃げ出したくないよ
subtitles.english: I don't want to run away

subtitles.original: あの日に戻りたくなるよ
subtitles.english: It makes me want to go back to that day

subtitles.original: 振り向いてばかりの現在ならば 諦めよう
subtitles.english: If the present is just about looking back, let's give up

subtitles.original: 抱ききれない祈りも
subtitles.english: Prayers I can't fully embrace

subtitles.original: 確かめたい気持ちも
subtitles.english: Feelings I want to confirm

subtitles.original: 今なら言えるだろうか
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can say it now

subtitles.original: 終わらせたくはないんだと知って
subtitles.english: Knowing that I don't want it to end

subtitles.original: 何度でも言うよ 景色は儚げに
subtitles.english: I'll say it as many times as it takes, the scenery is fleeting

subtitles.original: 足元はおぼつかない 気づけば走り出していたんだ
subtitles.english: My footing is unsteady, before I knew it I was running

subtitles.original: 何度でも言うよ 会いたい言葉など
subtitles.english: I'll say it as many times as it takes, words like 'I miss you'

subtitles.original: 見つかるわけでもない それでもただ信じてみたいから
subtitles.english: Can't be found, but even so I just want to try and believe
